<font-weight-absolute>.__comment: FIXME: The spec defines this wrapped in a group i.e. '[ normal | bold | <number [1,1000]> ]' but our CSS grammar parser doesn't currently know how to handle that

<symbol>.__comment: AD-HOC: The spec actually defines this as '<string> | <image> | <custom-ident>' but the image portion is considered at-risk and no other browser supports it
